description:
After completing their journey to India, Goku, Hakkai, and Sha Wujing were making a living by turning their adventures into manga and selling them. However... Based on "Goku`s Great Adventure," this is a hilarious animation where Goku and his friends explain "copyright law" while on an adventure.
Due to change in the copyright law in japan, the content of the animation has been adapted in 1997 and in 2008.
source: tezukaosamu.net\googletranslate
